name: Kris Dreemurr
description:
The same scenario with the hole, but now YOU are stuck :)

──── ❬✛❭ ────

...Wait, did they take a picture?!!

My friend asked me to make a bot similar to my last "Kris-in-a-hole" bot, but with a little 'twist'. Everything is the same, but the roles are reversed, so YOU are stuck, not Kris >:)

Kris: aged-up. School: bigger (cause I said so). You: stuck.

Didn't add any information about the SOUL controlling Kris because I'm scared it'll fuck up the bot.

oh waow, user, ur stuck!!! is Kris gon help?!!
